name: iStratgo
description: iStratgo takes away the headache of manual performance management processes without removing the element of human touch or interaction. Learn more about iStratgo

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: It is easy to use with plain english titles
reviews.review_cons: Maybe may need to review after integrating with other systems

reviews.review_description: Good experience, also reminded me of my birthday when i have forgot.
reviews.review_pros: Efficient and good for data base management and adaptable
reviews.review_cons: Havent faced any challenge as for now, but sometimes it slows down

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: Yes it is easy to use and doesn't need any additional features
reviews.review_cons: No products to be used and yes it was challenging

reviews.review_title: Value for money online Performance Management platform
reviews.review_description: The ability to keep records of training, qualification, performance and potential in one tool.Its an easy platform to use and the workflows generate reminders to users of what they need to do at each step once it has been set up. I am overall happy with the solution which is stable, intuitive and relatively inexpensive.
reviews.review_pros: We were doing biannual performance reviews using Excel templated which had to be captured and analysed manually. This process has had great user acceptance and buy in. The overall ratings is based on KPI's in the individual scorecard, and 360 Surveys on Company Values and Competencies. The next module we want to roll out will be the potential evaluations which together with the PR ratings will give us a dashboard of our workforce in a 9 -Box matrix. The Training Module is easy to set up and to capture records. The platform is stable.
reviews.review_cons: Before using i Strago, you would need to ensure that users are already familiar with giving feedback, the KPI's are well known and understood and that they can accurately apply the rating scale. If this is in place, it is a relatively easy platform to introduce. There are still a few small design bugs in the platform, but the support team are quite responsive and get back to you quite quickly and resolve them.

reviews.review_description: It is a great system to use ,Im also impressed by all the changes and new features that have been done on the system.The Pay Info now has a slot for Banking details and Tax number.
reviews.review_pros: The system is easy to use and very handy .All staff information can be captured and uploaded to the system.All types of report are accessible and easy to pull on this system
reviews.review_cons: I don't like that even after an employee is Inactive , they can still be seen when you go to employee administration. Its good that their information should be there ,but can it only be seen when that Inactive employee's Profile is Pulled. Employee admin should only show Active employees

reviews.review_description: Performance Management was a huge pain point within our business due to the manual process we were following. Digitizing our Performance Management process has gained the appreciation and participation of all concerned. It does not detract from the need to spend time with your employees face to face, but the quick return of KPA Scores which can easily be channeled into Development Plans and subsequent Succession Plans makes the effort so much more worthwhile. The use of a variety of difference measurement channels allows for far more objective analysis.
reviews.review_pros: User-friendly Able to customize to suit our business requirements Excellent reporting functionality
reviews.review_cons: Initial set up was a bit tedious, but that applies to ANY software system

reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and the support from the Client Success Consultant is out of this world.
reviews.review_cons: Surveys are not easily creatable, need some back end development on this

reviews.review_description: iStratgo is a great tool to measure performance and projects. It is an all in one tool to manage staff and HR requirements.
reviews.review_pros: iStratgo is easy to use and adopt. The setup is quick and you start generating value immediately.
reviews.review_cons: We do not use all the features that the system offers.

reviews.review_description: ability to measure performance, capacity and productivity
reviews.review_pros: Employee database accessibility and the dashboard

reviews.review_description: Employee database Leave Management, Performance Management , and Talent Management and Reward

reviews.review_description: Proper discussion of PDP between Managers and Staff
reviews.review_pros: I am the admin user, it is easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: The email below was sent to all staff without discussion Below is a list of tasks awaiting to be completed: • Complete 3600 (1) Please log onto iStratgo and navigate to to Reports -> Dashboard -> My Dasboard. This confused our staff members

reviews.review_pros: Goals setting and talent development tools which makes easy to monitor and track progress

reviews.review_description: Employees are more aware of the importance of performance management.
